display.purpose: Hero <h1> title only. One per page. Always Bebas Neue.

headline.purpose: Section <h2> titles. Bebas Neue. One per section.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy. Syne 400. Muted Frost color.

label.purpose: All metadata: chips, dates, nav links, stat labels. Space Mono, uppercase, tracked.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Transform + shadow hover transitions, mobile nav slide

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Lava Orange fill, Void Black text, pill-shaped. Used for primary on-page actions.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@700&display=swap'); .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #fb923c; color: #060a10; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; min-height: 44px; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(251,146,60,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(251,146,60,0.6); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fb923c; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Glass-surface fill with glass border. Border and text shift to Lava Orange on hover.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@700&display=swap'); .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #e2eaf5; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; min-height: 44px; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.3s, color 0.3s; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #fb923c; color: #fb923c; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fb923c; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Discord Button
components.description: Join Discord CTA. Discord Blurple fill. Used exclusively for Discord join actions.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@700&display=swap'); .ds-btn-discord { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #5865f2; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; min-height: 44px; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(88,101,242,0.3); } .ds-btn-discord:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(88,101,242,0.5); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-discord:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5865f2; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary container. Glassmorphism surface with dual-tone border for dimensional light-source effect.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-left-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius: 24px; padding: 2.5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } @supports (backdrop-filter: blur(1px)) or (-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(1px)) { .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px); } } .ds-card-glass::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -50%; left: -60%; width: 40%; height: 200%; background: linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 40%, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 50%, transparent 60%); transform: skewX(-15deg); transition: left 0.6s ease; pointer-events: none; } .ds-card-glass:hover::after { left: 130%; }

components.name: Member Tag — Leader
components.description: Roster chip for clan leaders. Lava Orange tint with orange text.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono&display=swap'); .ds-member-tag { padding: 0.4rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-member-leader { background: rgba(251,146,60,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(251,146,60,0.35); color: #fb923c; } .ds-member-tag:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #ef4444; color: #ef4444; } .ds-member-tag:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fb923c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Member Tag — Member
components.description: Roster chip for standard clan members. Glass surface with frost text.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono&display=swap'); .ds-member-tag { padding: 0.4rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-member-std { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); color: #e2eaf5; } .ds-member-tag:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #ef4444; color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Meta Chip
components.description: Pill-shaped metadata label used inside cards. Three variants: default (muted), accent (orange), secondary (red).
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono&display=swap'); .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.3rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); color: rgba(226,234,245,0.5); } .ds-chip-accent { border-color: #fb923c; color: #fb923c; } .ds-chip-secondary { border-color: #ef4444; color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact glass card for numeric stats. Used in the hero grid. Number in Bebas Neue / Lava Orange, label in Space Mono.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Space+Mono&display=swap'); .ds-stat-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-left-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius: 14px; padding: 1rem 0.75rem; text-align: center; } @supports (backdrop-filter: blur(1px)) or (-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(1px)) { .ds-stat-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px); } } .ds-stat-num { font-family: 'Bebas Neue', Impact, sans-serif; font-size: 2.2rem; color: #fb923c; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(226,234,245,0.5); margin-top: 0.3rem; }

narrative.overview:
The Nether is a void. Hostile by default, navigable by force of labor and organization. The Highway Men's visual system lives here: a dark, pressurized environment where every surface floats above the void behind it, every accent is heat against cold, and order is something you impose by showing up every day and moving blocks. There is nothing decorative about this system. What reads as aesthetic is a direct translation of what THM does — precision infrastructure in an environment that wants to kill you.

The glass surfaces are the Nether grid: semi-transparent layers suspended over the atmospheric background, catching light from the orange and red orbs that breathe underneath. The typography is blunt and structural — Bebas Neue was designed for weight and impact, Space Mono signals precision and technical record-keeping, and Syne bridges them with contemporary forward motion. Hierarchy is created through scale and contrast, not through decoration.

This system explicitly rejects: generic gaming-clan aesthetics (cheesy HUD overlays, fantasy fonts, Roblox-energy, stock Minecraft theming), and corporate SaaS landing-page patterns (warm-neutral body backgrounds, hero-metric stat cards, 'Join the waitlist' energy, decorative glassmorphism deployed without purpose).
keyCharacteristics: Void-black (#060a10) base — deep-space charcoal, not pure black
Glass surfaces as dimensional layers over the animated atmospheric background
Three-tier heat palette: Lava Orange (primary CTA), Nether Red (secondary emphasis), Volcanic Brown (deep heat)
Bebas Neue for impact display, Space Mono for precision labels, Syne for readable body
Atmospheric motion: background orbs breathe, sections reveal on scroll, elements float
Pill-shaped buttons (50px radius) creating floating, decisive CTAs against the dark

rules.name: The Heat Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Lava Orange is for action. Nether Red is for emphasis. Volcanic Brown is for atmosphere. They never swap roles.

rules.name: The Discord Quarantine Rule
rules.body: Discord Blurple (#5865f2) appears only on Discord CTAs. It is structural, not decorative.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Contract
rules.body: Space Mono is exclusively for labels, chips, dates, and navigation. Never for body prose or headings.

rules.name: The Gradient Ceiling
rules.body: Gradient text (-webkit-background-clip: text) is permitted on one element only: the hero <h1> display title. One instance, always the display title.

rules.name: The Atmospheric Dependency Rule
rules.body: Glass cards depend entirely on the animated background orbs for their visual effect. Never remove or disable the background layer.

rules.name: The Shadow Prohibition
rules.body: box-shadow is not used in this system. Depth comes from glass treatment and the background, not from painted-on shadows.

dos: Do use Bebas Neue for all h1 and h2 display headings, and Space Mono for all label/chip/nav text.
Do start every page with the animated background layer (.bg-layer + three .orb elements).
Do apply the dual-border highlight technique to all glass cards: border-top-color and border-left-color at 0.25 opacity.
Do size tap targets to minimum 44×44px on interactive elements.
Do include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) on every animation.
Do use @supports (backdrop-filter) guards before applying the blur treatment.
Do reserve Discord Blurple exclusively for Discord CTAs.
Do use clamp() for all display and headline font sizes.
donts: Don't use gradient text anywhere except the hero <h1>. One instance in the system, total.
Don't use box-shadow for card depth. This system achieves depth through glass, not shadow.
Don't use warm-neutral, cream, paper, or parchment backgrounds. The body background is always Void Black (#060a10).
Don't apply glassmorphism to non-container elements (text, icons, decorative dividers).
Don't use gaming-cliché styling: no HUD overlays, no neon green, no fantasy display fonts.
Don't apply SaaS landing-page patterns: no hero-metric stat card grids, no warm-tinted paper backgrounds.
Don't use uppercase tracking outside Space Mono label contexts.
Don't add a fourth accent color without retiring one. The three-tier heat palette is complete.
Don't use border-left stripes as colored accents on cards.
Don't gate any content visibility on a JavaScript-triggered class.
